item.title: One VTuber Weeb VS hololive
item.author: hwikky
item.content:encoded:
✨Turn on CC for English subtitles ⭐ Please follow and support! Twitter - https://twitter.com/hwikkyofficial Patreon - https://www.patreon.com/hwikky ko-fi - https://www.ko-fi.com/hwikky
#hololivefesEXPO25 #hololive #ホロライブ
- Video Credit 【#hololivefesEXPO25_DAY1】hololive 6th fes. Color Rise Harmony hololive STAGE2【チラ見せ】 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4C3kreEOk1Q&t=506s
【 #hololivefesEXPO25_DAY1 】hololive SUPER EXPO 2025 EXPO STAGE https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wk3kGkYSRXs&t=5739s
- Music Credit Music author: Antonio Vivaldi Musical interpretation: John Harrison (http://www.johnharrisonviolin.com/) Music title: Spring Mvt 1 Allegro License: CC BY-SA (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/deed.es) Download: https://lamusicagratis.com/descargar-musica/primavera-movimiento-alegre
Music author: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart Musical interpretation: Advent Chamber Orchestra Music title: Pequeña serenata nocturna K. 525: I Allegro License: CC BY-SA (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/deed.es CC BY-SA) Download: https://lamusicagratis.com/descargar-musica/pequena-serenata-nocturna-allegro
Music author: Frédéric Chopin Music title: Nocturnos, Op. 9 License: Public Domain Download: https://lamusicagratis.com/descargar-musica/nocturnos-op-9

item.title: バニーラミィちゃん☃️ #hololive #illustration #雪花ラミィ #short
item.author: Riko-m

item.title: 從香港飛到日本就為了洗個澡 !【 Hololive Vlog 】
item.author: Gordon Yeung
item.content:encoded:
我特地飛到日本，只為了洗個澡……當然，不是普通的澡，而是特別的 Hololive x Spa 聯名合作！
這次只待了短短的 2天（13/04 - 15/04），但行程超級充實： • 參觀了 Hololive 聯名溫泉 🚿 • 第一次在日本網咖過夜 🛋️ • 第一次親眼看到櫻花盛開 🌸 • 在短短時間內體驗了好多事！
這真的是一次瘋狂又難忘的旅程！希望你會喜歡這支 vlog！
想看更多動態，歡迎追蹤我的 Instagram：@gordonyeung314

item.title: Hololive Advent Pop Up Shop Overview
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Sleeping World" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks Hololive event overview playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct747dYypRmQIIfyGFXxB3yg
▼Related Videos▼ Visiting the MiKorone Temple and Sonic Korone Cafe: https://youtu.be/BdyVIQGBzbE
▼Related Links▼ Official site: https://shibuyatsutaya.tsite.jp/article/939.html You can order the figures here (not sure about outside of Japan): https://coco-store.jp/products/49 Location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/V9qtG1Y6cgrhed8Q8
